utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final package: (1) destination: yes, fully specified (Prague). (2) travel_dates: yes, specific dates provided. (3) transportation: yes, includes flight details with costs. (4) accommodation: yes, includes hotel details and cost. (5) activities: yes, includes two named activities with costs. (6) additional_services: present but empty (no extra services were listed, but the field is included). (7) total_budget: included with cost breakdown. All fields are present and filled, though additional_services is empty but still covered as no extras are required. So all 7/7 items are covered.
